violations.text: At the time of inspection, the establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application was printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

At the time of inspection, Whole shell eggs and thawing beef were observed stored on shelving in the refrigerator above Ready to Eat foods. Raw animal foods are to be stored or arranged in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Food items were rearranged for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Stuffed Pumpkins were observed held at 58 degrees Fahrenheit in the reach-in refrigerator. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. At the time of inspection, the PIC was not aware of the previous day processes/preparations. Stuffed Pumpkins were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Food items prepared on site and prepackaged food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation/use. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and prepacked foods that require dating after opening (Cheeses) and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation/use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
